languages.text: "Элана — слугам Золотого Трона. Координаты для удара по главному штабу: четыре-Кси, Ро-Сигма..." {n}Высокая женщина, склонившаяся над воксом, всецело поглощена переговорами, не замечая вашего появления.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Элана — слугам Золотого Трона. Координаты для удара по главному штабу: четыре-Кси, Ро-Сигма..." {n}Высокая женщина, склонившаяся над воксом, всецело поглощена переговорами, не замечая вашего появления.{/n}
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Coordinates to strike the main headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma..." {n}The tall woman standing over the vox is fully absorbed in her transmission and does not notice your presence.{/n}

languages.text: «Elana a los sirvientes del Trono Dorado. Coordenadas para golpear el cuartel general: Cuatro-Xi, Ro-Sigma...». {n}La alta mujer frente al voco está tan absorta en su transmisión que no se percata de tu presencia.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Coordinates to strike the main headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma..." {n}The tall woman standing over the vox is fully absorbed in her transmission and does not notice your presence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Elana a los sirvientes del Trono Dorado. Coordenadas para golpear el cuartel general: Cuatro-Xi, Ro-Sigma...». {n}La alta mujer frente al voco está tan absorta en su transmisión que no se percata de tu presencia.{/n}

languages.text: “埃拉娜呼叫黄金王座仆从。针对总部的打击坐标：4-克西，罗-西格玛……”{n}站在音阵旁的那名高挑女子正专注于通讯之中，并未察觉到你的存在。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Coordinates to strike the main headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma..." {n}The tall woman standing over the vox is fully absorbed in her transmission and does not notice your presence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “埃拉娜呼叫黄金王座仆从。针对总部的打击坐标：4-克西，罗-西格玛……”{n}站在音阵旁的那名高挑女子正专注于通讯之中，并未察觉到你的存在。{/n}

languages.text: « Elana aux serviteurs du Trône d'Or. Voici les coordonnées du quartier général à cibler : quatre-xi, rho-sigma... » {n}La grande femme penchée sur le vox est si absorbée par sa transmission qu'elle ne remarque pas votre présence.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Coordinates to strike the main headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma..." {n}The tall woman standing over the vox is fully absorbed in her transmission and does not notice your presence.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Elana aux serviteurs du Trône d'Or. Voici les coordonnées du quartier général à cibler : quatre-xi, rho-sigma... » {n}La grande femme penchée sur le vox est si absorbée par sa transmission qu'elle ne remarque pas votre présence.{/n}

languages.text: "Elana'dan Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarına. Vurulmak üzere ana karargâh koordinatları: Dört-Ksi, Ro-Sigma..." {n}Voksun başında duran uzun boylu kadın, yayınına tamamen dalmış olduğundan varlığını fark etmiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Coordinates to strike the main headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma..." {n}The tall woman standing over the vox is fully absorbed in her transmission and does not notice your presence.{/n}

languages.text: "Elana an Diener des Goldenen Throns. Koordinaten für Angriff auf Hauptquartier: Vier-Xi, Rho-Sigma ..." {n}Die über das Vox gebeugte Frau ist so sehr in ihre Übertragung vertieft, dass sie deine Gegenwart zunächst nicht bemerkt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Coordinates to strike the main headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma..." {n}The tall woman standing over the vox is fully absorbed in her transmission and does not notice your presence.{/n}

languages.text: 「エラーナと黄金の王座のしもべたちへ。本拠地を攻撃するための座標：四・シ、ロ・シグマ…」{n}ヴォックスの向こうに立つ背の高い女性は、通信に集中しており、あなたの存在に気づいていない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Coordinates to strike the main headquarters: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma..." {n}The tall woman standing over the vox is fully absorbed in her transmission and does not notice your presence.{/n}
